series_metadata.series_title: Case Hearing Files of Disciplinary Actio
series_metadata.series_description: File include charge letter, hearing officer report commission findings and order, transcripts, appeal documents, court certification and court decisions. Case hearing files of disciplinary actions initiated against real estate licensees pursuant 4735 and 119.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Microform: master microfilm in off site storage ; Paper: case is considered be closed, hard copy records 3 years
